subject: GO route: commit Slice A exact bundle
body: Controller GO for Arboreal Slice A commit window. Fronded gave post-fix GO and Embered reported queue/index clear. Please open a short git:index/head claim, enqueue an exact commit intent, stage only these paths, verify staged exactly, commit, complete the queue entry, close your Slice A claims, then report residue. Exact Slice A paths: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/snapshot.ts; agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/operator-value.ts; agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/text.ts; agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts; agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-text.unit.test.ts. Suggested subject: feat(agent-tools): surface p8 operator value signals. Do not include Nebulous controller/app-test files or coordination residue. Do not claim P8-A4 complete or P8 complete.
